name: lcd-bitmap-ide
description: LCD-bitmap IDE offline workbench for LCD screens, bitmap glyphs, FSM flows and firmware C exports.
author: myahlovvlad <myahlov@gmail.com>

scripts.electron:dev: concurrently -k "npm:dev" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && node scripts/build-electron-main.mjs && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test:coverage && npm run test:renderer && npm run test:importer && npm run build && npm run test:e2e:prepared
scripts.check:full: npm run check && npm run test:dev && npm run test:electron && npm run test:performance && npm run docs:manual
scripts.build: npm run typecheck && vite build && npm run electron:build
scripts.build:all: npm run build:windows && npm run build:macos && npm run build:linux
scripts.test:fsm-roundtrip:integration: vitest run tests/utils/fsmRoundTripHistory.test.ts tests/utils/fsmRoundTripConflict.test.ts tests/utils/fsmRoundTripLayout.test.ts tests/utils/fsmRoundTripScreenLinks.test.ts tests/utils/fsmRoundTripHandles.test.ts
scripts.test:fsm-roundtrip:e2e: npm run build && playwright test --config playwright.config.ts tests/e2e/fsm-script-mermaid-roundtrip.spec.ts tests/e2e/fsm-script-python-dsl-roundtrip.spec.ts tests/e2e/fsm-script-errors.spec.ts tests/e2e/fsm-script-stale-preview.spec.ts tests/e2e/fsm-script-destructive-change.spec.ts
scripts.test:fsm-roundtrip:acceptance: npm run test:fsm-roundtrip && npm run test:fsm-security && npm run test:fsm-roundtrip:integration && npm run test:fsm-roundtrip:e2e
scripts.test:fsm-script-sync:e2e: npm run build && playwright test --config playwright.config.ts tests/e2e/fsm-script-auto-preview.spec.ts tests/e2e/fsm-script-dirty-protection.spec.ts tests/e2e/fsm-script-format-drafts.spec.ts tests/e2e/fsm-script-graph-refresh.spec.ts tests/e2e/fsm-script-stale-preview.spec.ts
scripts.test:fsm-script-sync:acceptance: npm run test:fsm-script-sync:integration && npm run test:fsm-script-sync:e2e && npx vitest run tests/utils/architectureBoundary.test.ts
scripts.test:fsm-behavior:acceptance: npm run test:fsm-behavior && npm run test:fsm-behavior:persistence && npm run test:fsm-behavior:codec-security && npm run test:fsm-behavior:compatibility && npm run test:fsm-roundtrip && npm run test:fsm-security && npm run test:fsm-roundtrip:integration
scripts.test:screen-interchange:acceptance: npm run test:screen-interchange && npm run test:screen-interchange:security && npm run test:screen-interchange:performance && npx vitest run tests/utils/architectureBoundary.test.ts
scripts.test:screen-dsl:file-security: npm run test:screen-dsl:file && vitest run tests/utils/screenDslFileSecurity.test.ts && npm run test:screen-dsl:security
scripts.test:screen-dsl:integration: npm run test:screen-dsl && npm run test:screen-dsl:application && npm run test:screen-dsl:atomicity && npm run test:screen-dsl:ui && npm run test:screen-dsl:file
scripts.test:screen-dsl:acceptance: npm run test:screen-dsl && npm run test:screen-dsl:security && npm run test:screen-dsl:application && npm run test:screen-dsl:atomicity && npm run test:screen-dsl:session && npm run test:screen-dsl:ui && npm run test:screen-dsl:ui-integration && npm run test:screen-dsl:file && npm run test:screen-dsl:performance && npm run test:screen-interchange:acceptance && npx vitest run tests/utils/architectureBoundary.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build && npm run test:e2e:prepared
scripts.test:electron: npm run build && playwright test --config playwright.electron.config.ts
scripts.test:performance: npm run build && playwright test --config playwright.performance.config.ts
scripts.test:package:win: npm run build && electron-builder --win --dir && cross-env "ELECTRON_EXECUTABLE_PATH=release/win-unpacked/LCD-bitmap IDE.exe" playwright test --config playwright.electron.config.ts
